parameters.name: Render scada-dashboard.svg
parameters.description: One-SVG everything-at-a-glance. Seven panels composed from the atomic svg_widget library: CATALOG · ENTERPRISE · PIPELINE · IDENTITY · TAGS · FAULTS · HEARTBEAT. Pulls from /api/health.json, /runtime/tags.json, /api/state.json, state.db.pipeline_runs, and the GitHub-Issue tag DB.
